info.description: Production API for BookNest online bookstore. v1 is stable; all endpoints require strict request validation and JWT auth where applicable.
info.title: BookNest API

put.description: Updates an order status as admin

post.description: Sends a message to the configured AI provider
Sends password reset link or OTP to email/mobile
Login using email or mobile and password
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token
Creates a new user account and sends email & mobile verification
Creates a new admin account through the API and sends email & mobile verification
Resends verification email if not verified
Resends mobile OTP if not verified
Reset password for authenticated user
Reset password using forgot-password reset token
Verifies email using token
Verifies mobile using OTP
Creates a new author (admin only)

get.description: Fetches a single author by its ID

post.description: Creates a new book (admin only)
Filters books by criteria and pagination

parameters.description: Search by name, author, or ISBN
parameters.name: search

get.description: Returns books recommended for the authenticated user based on their purchase history using semantic embeddings
Supports offset and cursor based pagination with catalog filters
get.summary: Query books with filters and pagination

get.description: Searches books by natural language query using vector similarity
Fetches a single book by its ID

post.description: Generates and stores AI categories for a book (admin only)
Generates and stores AI embeddings for a book (admin only)

get.description: Returns all reviews for a specific book with summary stats

post.description: Creates or updates the current user's review for a specific book
Generates and stores an AI summary for a book (admin only)

get.description: Fetches the authenticated user's cart with items and totals

post.description: Removes all items from the authenticated user's cart

put.description: Updates quantity for a cart item in the authenticated user's cart

post.description: Adds a book to the authenticated user's cart

delete.description: Removes a book from the authenticated user's cart

post.description: Uploads a book cover image to S3 and returns the public URL

get.description: Lists orders for the authenticated user

post.description: Cancels a pending order for the authenticated user
Creates an order from the authenticated user's cart
Confirms payment for an existing order
Create a new publisher

get.description: Fetch user details by user ID

delete.description: User can delete only their own account

cancellation_reason.example: Out of stock after payment failure.

description.example: A dystopian novel set in a totalitarian society ruled by Big Brother.

summary.example: A gripping dystopian classic about surveillance and control, following Winston Smith as he questions the Party's reality. Orwell's chilling vision explores truth, freedom, and resistance under totalitarian rule.

description.example: A dystopian novel set in a totalitarian society ruled by Big Brother.
